subcodes.first_line: To Thee be praise, O my God, for having singled out Thy servant whom Thou hast honored with Thy presence and caused to hearken unto Thy verses, O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما اختصصت عبدک الذی شرفته بلقائک و اسمعته آیاتک یا الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
